name: lfmt-poc
description: Long-Form Translation Service POC - AWS serverless translation platform for 65K-400K word documents

scripts.setup: npm run setup:hooks && npm run install:all
scripts.install:all: npm run install:shared && npm run install:infra
scripts.install:shared: cd shared-types && npm install --cache=/tmp/npm-cache && npm run build
scripts.test:all: npm run test:shared && npm run test:infra
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build:infra
scripts.validate: npm run build:all && npm run test:all && npm run security:check
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:shared && npm run lint:infra
scripts.lint:shared: cd shared-types && npm run lint || echo 'Linting not configured for shared-types'
scripts.lint:infra: cd backend/infrastructure && npm run lint || echo 'Linting not configured for infrastructure'
scripts.deploy:dev: cd backend/infrastructure && npm run build && npx cdk deploy --context environment=dev
scripts.deploy:staging: cd backend/infrastructure && npm run build && npx cdk deploy --context environment=staging
scripts.synth: cd backend/infrastructure && npm run build && npx cdk synth --context environment=dev

author: LFMT Team
//overrides: Root-level only: per-workspace `overrides` blocks (in shared-types/, backend/infrastructure/) are silently ignored by npm — only this root block fires for workspace members. Standalone packages NOT in `workspaces` (backend/functions/, frontend/) keep their own `overrides` because their installs are independent of this lockfile (npm ci runs there separately). minimatch=^9.0.7 escapes the GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26 / GHSA-7r86-cg39-jmmj / GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74 ReDoS range (9.0.0-9.0.6). brace-expansion=^5.0.5 is precautionary — current resolved versions in the tree are 1.1.13/2.0.2/2.0.3 (none in the vulnerable 4.0.0-5.0.4 range), so this override is a forward-guard against future hoists, not active remediation today.
